author: Mikey Watts
name: CE + Embedding Loss + Uniformity Loss
blurb: Adds an auxiliary embedding loss (1 - cosine similarity between softmax-weighted predicted embedding and ground-truth token embedding) plus a uniformity loss (Wang & Isola 2020) to prevent embedding collapse. Untied embeddings, lambda=1.0, gamma=2.0, run on 8xH100 SXM for 10 minutes. Despite showing slightly better convergence per step in small-scale experiments, the 2x step overhead from the auxiliary losses results in worse wall-clock performance. Note: submission exceeds the 16MB cap (16,311,598 bytes) due to untied embeddings.
